title: Integrating Automated Accessibility Testing into the CI/CD Pipeline

questions.sentence: Ensuring continuous web accessibility across large and fastmoving front end projects is a significant challenge
To maintain compliance with WCAG standards manual audits are not enough
high performing teams integrate automated accessibility testing directly into their CICD pipelines
While automated tools cannot catch 100 of accessibility problems they can identify up to 50 of the most common issues before the code even reaches production
This proactive approach ensures that your application remains inclusive for all users and reduces the long term cost of fixing accessibility debt
